subcodes.title: Aux baha'is de France
subcodes.first_line: A l'occasion de ce joyeux festival de Ridván, " Plus Grand Festival ", " Festival de Dieu ", alors que le monde Bahá'
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from UHR1984 — France-specific Ridván letter addressed to French community, different from general 1984 message
